appraisal_events.evidence: « Celui-ci ne répondit pas et en se dérobant fit manquer la brillante joute que Mme Verdurin se réjouissait d'offrir à comte de Forcheville. »
appraisal_events.explanation: By refusing to offer his own definition and dodging the exchange, Swann undercuts the staged intellectual duel Mme Verdurin hoped to display for Forcheville; Odette’s sulky remark frames this as Swann deeming others ‘not up to the mark.’

status_effects.explanation: Her hostess strategy to showcase a ‘brillante joute’ fails publicly when Swann withholds, slightly lowering her local standing as entertainer-organizer.
Odette openly casts his refusal as disdain (qu’il ne trouve pas les autres ‘à la hauteur’), which locally harms his personal appraisal within the group.
